rulings.Case Title: CARLOS FIGUEROA VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK, F.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 21, 2011, line 9, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, FOR ITESLF AND AS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION, 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION (TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY OUTSIDE PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION AGREEMENT IF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH). SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 17TH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION (TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING ENTITLEMENT TO EQUITABLE RELIEF). SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 16TH CAUSE OF ACTION, AND 18TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD AS REMEDIES. =(302/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. RICCI CORNELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Deft'S Request For Admissions And Unlawful Detainer Form Interrgoatories And To Compel The Deposition Of Their Person Most Knowledgable
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 21, 2011, line 13, DEFENDANTS RICCI CORNELL, LACAU, CLARICE, DBA JELLY'S A DANCE CAFE, CORZAC, INC. Re-Notice Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Defendant's Request For Admissions And Unlawful Detainer Form Interrgoatories And To Compel The Deposition Of Their Person Most Knowledgable. DENY MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION. MARCH 1 DEPOSITION NOTICE FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 2025.270(b). DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AT LEAST 5 DAYS NOTICE. DENY MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A SEPARATE STATEMENT PER CRC 3.1345. DENY SANCTIONS. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER. =(302/PHA)
